macro_gravity_field.description: Objective environment and competitor mass (Cannot be directly altered)

metrics.objective_meaning: The total volume of the market category expanded by 8.5%.

jtbd_demand_field.description: Consumer intent, momentum, and displacement (The 4 dimensions)

metrics.objective_meaning: The frequency of users actively searching for the brand on Douyin dropped by 70%.
The frequency of users actively searching for the brand on Xiaohongshu increased by 22%.
The ratio of users purchasing after reading an article increased by 42% when a link was provided.

supply_capability_field.description: Internal constraints, channel execution, and HR/Operations

metrics.objective_meaning: The absolute number of first-time buyers at physical counters decreased by 15.5%.
The gross merchandise value generated through the JD platform increased by 67.5%.
